title: stelis pygmaea
intro: Stelis pygmaea, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a small, delicate orchid species native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis pygmaea are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Stelis pygmaea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
